positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a cosmic fox, sitting atop a stylized crescent moon. The fox has glowing, iridescent tails and large, expressive eyes. The scene is set against a deep indigo and teal cosmic nebula background, featuring scattered constellations and geometric star patterns. Silhouette style, with strong outlines and negative space contrast. The color palette should be limited to royal blue, electric teal, gold leaf accents, and deep black. Clean, high contrast, designed for seamless apparel printing. Aspect ratio 1:1. Graphic novel aesthetic, art deco influence, highly detailed, vector art, ultra clean lines.
negative: blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, low resolution, dirty, artifact, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, messy, gradient, noise
